prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model, a common theoretical approach for modeling stock prices over short to medium time horizons. The current price of WFC ($81.45) is used as the starting point. For this 21-day prediction, an annualized drift (expected return) of 7% and an annualized volatility (standard deviation of returns) of 25% were assumed, which are generalized estimates for a large-cap bank stock. The point estimate represents the median price forecast in 21 trading days according to the GBM model. The confidence intervals indicate the range within which the price is expected to fall with the specified probability, derived from the assumed volatility. These are theoretical estimates and actual market performance can vary significantly due to unforeseen events, market sentiment, and other factors not captured by this simplified model.
